issues.detail: The instructions do not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as API failures or network issues.

scenarios.name: backtest-crypto-ema-crossover
scenarios.rationale: Response B better meets the rubric, covering EMA, RSI, commission/slippage, metrics, and buy‑and‑hold, whereas Response A uses SMA, lacks RSI, and misapplies commission handling.

scenarios.name: deploy-live-alpaca-momentum-bot
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully implements limit orders, risk rules, logging, and stop‑trading logic, while Response A is incomplete and lacks these core elements.
